segments.text: I'd like to say just landing hits would do it, but...
segments.original_text: 触ってしまえばと言いたいところですが

segments.text: Even landing hits on Marth is tough - that's what makes this character so difficult!
segments.original_text: 触ってもなお難しいのがこのマルスというファイターの特徴です

segments.text: Deny the getup, deny the getup - gets the read!
segments.original_text: さあ上がらせない上がらせない回避を見て

full_text: I'd like to say just landing hits would do it, but... Even landing hits on Marth is tough - that's what makes this character so difficult! Frame-perfect airdodge! Fair! Deny the getup, deny the getup - gets the read! Finishes with back air!
